NAME: Sami Jasim Muhammad Jaata Al-Jaburi
AKA: Mustafa Adnan al-Aziz; Mustafa Adnan al-Azeez; Sami al-Ajuz; Hajji Hamid
OTHER_INFO: QDi.437. Listed 26 March 2026. Senior ISIS/Da'esh commander in Iraq and Syria (QDe.115). Oversaw financial affairs and revenues. Member of the Delegated Committee. UN SC Resolution 2734 (2024).
REMARK: Bahrain Official Gazette Issue No. 3869, 29 March 2026. UN SC Resolutions 1267 (1999), 1989 (2011), 2253 (2015).
